diagnosis: This is a Layer 2 (configuration/runtime-contract) failure, not an infra or code crash. The training process itself is healthy: CUDA is available, PyTorch build matches CUDA, STDERR is empty, and the script exits with code 0. The remaining failure is due to an output-path contract mismatch: `train.py` defaults to `os.path.abspath("results")`, which depends on the launch CWD (`.../experiment`). Downstream job checks expect canonical artifacts under workspace-level `.../attempt-01/results`. So the run is marked FAILED even though training completed.

patches.description: Makes results path configurable via environment so launcher can force canonical artifact location without changing training logic.
